rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the correct scope: component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE expressions; do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts
generic_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in the correct scope for the target component or implementation
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE expressions to maintain consistency and avoid unresolved references
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
